articles.summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.

Introducing Claude Corps
articles.summary: We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America.

articles.summary: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.

articles.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
articles.summary: An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.
